rulings.Case Title: LARRY SUBLETT VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Limbach Facility Services, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 14, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Limbach Facility Services, LLC's motion to quash service of summons: hearing required. The hearing will be at 1:30p.m., not 9:30a.m., due to the Court's schedule. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
